## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss BaseTen's potential engagement with Lake's content marketing agency, focusing on process details and addressing AI content concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [BaseTen is eager to start ASAP due to recent funding and traffic loss on key keywords](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Lake's agency uses AI-assisted workflows but emphasizes human expertise for authentic content](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Proposed engagement: 2-month strategy sprint ($12k/mo) + optional 12-month growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Targeting 10 publish-ready pieces/week, with 5 as the minimum guarantee](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)

## Topics

### BaseTen's Recent Developments

  - [Secured a "massive round" of funding, generating excitement within the company](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Experiencing loss of traffic on important keywords, increasing urgency for content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [8-week strategy sprint to develop key artifacts (personas, brand voice, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [Weekly 30-min meetings + expert interviews to understand BaseTen's brand and audience](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Asynchronous collaboration via Slack, Notion, and Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Team structure: Managing Director, Managing Editor, and Content Manager assigned to BaseTen](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)

### AI Usage in Content Creation

  - [Sophisticated AI-assisted workflows leveraging rich context from strategy artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Human writers involved at every step, applying expertise beyond AI output](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Emphasis on avoiding typical AI content markers (e.g., overuse of dashes instead of commas)](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)

### Content Review and Approval

  - [Initial phase: In-person reviews and document commenting](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=599.0)
  - [Later phase: Simplified to quick Slack approvals](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [Flexibility to adjust based on BaseTen's preferences and comfort level](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)

### BaseTen's Team Involvement

  - [Key participants: Mike (Head of Marketing), Rachel (Technical PMM), Philippe (Head of DevRel), Marylise, Kenzie](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Additional technical experts (e.g., engineering) to be involved as needed](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)

### Engagement Terms

  - [Strategy Sprint: One-time fee, billed upfront with net 30](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Growth Execution: $12,000/month (negotiated down from $15,000), billed semi-annually](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
  - [7-day opt-out window before Phase 2 (Growth Execution) begins](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marylise to review SOW and initiate internal approval process](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=958.0)
  - [Lake to update SOW with reduced price ($12k/mo) and tentative Sept 15 kickoff date](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
  - [BaseTen to aim for contract signing by EOD Monday for Sept 15 start, or by Friday for Sept 22 start](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
  - [Lake to adjust kickoff date to Sept 22 if Monday deadline is missed](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
  - [BaseTen to prepare existing ICP and sales bootcamp content for agency onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/tPVTtewygwYn3xAHSmg_PCqnw16WFxvf?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
